title: version-hint.text file not created for Iceberg table when requested
description:
### Describe the bug
When requesting for Iceberg version hint when creating an Iceberg table, the respective key is not created on the bucket, then the CREATE statement fails.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal('/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/f0/', 'CSV') SETTINGS allow_dynamic_metadata_for_data_lakes = 1, iceberg_format_version = 2, iceberg_recent_metadata_file_by_last_updated_ms_field = 0, iceberg_use_version_hint = 1;
/*
DB::Exception: The specified key does not exist: while reading key:
data/file0/metadata/version-hint.text, from bucket: root. (S3_ERROR)
*/
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2 (value FLOAT, description VARCHAR NULL);
INSERT INTO t2 (value, description) VALUES (3.14, NULL);
SELECT t1.id, t2.value FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.id = 1;
key_bug_features: Iceberg version hint not created on table creation
